name: I Find It Embarrassing as a Human Being

issues.description: Missing required condition: TrashCount >= 10. Current condition is 'Always' but effect requires checking trash count.

Action 'Rest' is incorrect. The effect prevents attack (temporary restriction), not rests the character. Should use a keyword-granting action or custom duration logic, but 'Rest' alone doesn't capture 'cannot attack until end of opponent's next End Phase'.

Missing duration specification. Text states 'until the end of your opponent's next End Phase' — this is a conditional temporary effect during opponent's turn, requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' or similar timed mechanic.
